note: Community-tier (non-official) skills. These carry NO first-party provenance — they exercise the static-scan + typed-consent gate. v1 ships a single demonstration skill whose source is vendored locally under community/<id>/ so the gate runs end-to-end; fetch-on-install from repo@commit with an upstream byte-diff is DEFERRED (see docs/plan-skills-untrusted-install.md). The scan is ADVISORY — provenance + human review are the real trust anchor.
